Plaintiff Department Of Fair Employment And Housing Notice Of And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Francisco Balderrama (213-439-6799) of Dept of Fair Employment & Housing for Plaintiff/Moving party DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING.
Jason N. Wolford (415-265-2897) for Plaintiff Irene Reynoso.
Jack Praetzellis (9415-364-5540) of Fox Rothschild for Other Party E. Lynn Schoenmann.
John C. Ellis (714-992-6600) of Kennick & Associates for Defendant/opposing party John Y. Wong via Court Call.
Defendant, John Wong is present in Court.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. All Parties submit to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is GRANTED. A judgment for $350,000 shall enter. Request for pre-judgment interest is denied. Order is signed after hearing. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Intervene On Behalf Of Real Parties In Interest
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Francisco Balderrama, Esq. (213-337-4483) for Plaintiff/opposing party CA Dept. of Fair Housing through Court Call.
Daniel Wayne, Esq. (415-649-6203) for Intervenor/Moving party INTERVENOR HOUSING EQUALITY LAW PROJECT and IRENE REYNOSO.

The Court reads the tentative ruling and asks 2 questions: 1) Why should the Court permit intervention when a Defendant has defaulted and 2) The question of the sufficiency of the notice. Argued. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

INTERVENOR HOUSING EQUALITY LAW PROJECT and IRENE REYNOSO's Motion To Intervene On Behalf Of Real Parties In Interest is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
